nasb.text: Many are the sorrows of the wicked, But he who trusts in the Lord, lovingkindness shall surround him.

esv.text: Many are the sorrows of the wicked, but steadfast love surrounds the one who trusts in the Lord.

cnv.text: 惡人必受許多痛苦； 但倚靠耶和華的，必有慈愛四面環繞他。

ccb.text: 恶人必多遭祸患， 耶和华的慈爱必环绕信靠祂的人。

csbs.text: 恶人必有许多痛苦； 但依靠耶和华的，必有慈爱围绕他。
